title: poa versicolor subsp. relaxa
intro: Poa versicolor subsp. relaxa, also known as Poa annua subsp. relaxa or Annual Bluegrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa versicolor subsp. relaxa include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
